decisions.summary: Current diff is reviewable as one PR by one reviewer; source, tests, Story, architecture, and Design SSOT registry all implement the single story-scoped playbook export workflow.
decisions.reason: Diff has one CLI/exporter workflow plus its focused tests and local Story/Architecture lineage. Splitting docs, registry, source, and tests would reduce traceability because the playbook command contract is reviewed as one story-scoped surface.
